title: Bridge Essay: Reduced Precision Underwrites Ego Dissolution and Therapeutic Outcomes Under Psy

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Emptiness** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge rationale:** Emptiness — dissolution of self, DMN decoupling, ego dissolution.
**Phase context:** Self-dissolution — ego dissolution, DMN decoupling, non-self in neuroscience.

**Reduced Precision Underwrites Ego Dissolution and Therapeutic Outcomes Under Psychedelics.** — Frontiers in neuroscience (2022). DOI: 10.3389/fnins.2022.827400. PMID: 35368271. Evidence suggests classic psychedelics reduce the precision of belief updating and enable access to a range of alternate hypotheses that underwrite how we make sense of the world. This process, in the higher cortices, has been postulated to explain the therapeutic efficacy of psychedelics for the treatment of internalizing disorders. We argue reduced precision also underpins change to consciousness, known as "ego dissolution," and that alterations to consciousness and attention under psychedelic
